sources.notes: Normalized into sources[] from existing curatedFrom/sourcesUsed local archive traces; this records local archive provenance and is not an independent canon verification. Persona-5 completion 2026-06-24 consulted timeline/arcs/plot-summary and reports for a compact RP timeline index; many archive entries remain confidence C.

registryNotes: 结构修复：conflictLog 为空表示当前未登记冲突；需后续人工复核是否确无冲突。
Source-quality repair 2026-06-22: sources[] populated only from existing curatedFrom/sourcesUsed local archive traces; treat as provenance records, not independent canon verification.
Source-quality repair 2026-06-22: conflictLog empty classified as not-reviewed; absence of entries is not evidence of confirmed no conflicts unless later reviewed.

Persona-5 completion 2026-06-24: timeline-index.json added from local archive timeline/arcs/plot-summary plus reports; source confidence remains C for many archive entries and the module is an RP index, not independent canon verification.

conflictReviewStatus.reviewScope: registry metadata only; no new canon/source facts asserted
conflictReviewStatus.rationale: Empty conflictLog means no conflicts are currently registered in the curated file; it has not been independently reviewed as conflict-free. Persona-5 completion preserved this status after reading campaign reports/conflicts.md, which also does not register concrete conflicts.
